info.information: Hello! Welcome to my portfolio! Legal name's Annie Liang. At the time of creating this site, I am a senior at Marlboro High School. I've been doing HTML coding since 8th grade, and have been in the Web Design Program of Marlboro High School for the past 3 years! I also primarily do art and dabble in writing!

I've been doing HTML coding since the 8th grade on a website on ToyHouse! Upon learning that there was a Web Design program at Marlboro High School, I was adamant on taking the classes to further my HTML knowledge. However, I've learned more than just HTML, and have expanded my caliber since then. I've also been doing digital art since the 5th grade, and still actively participate in art-based communities online! I do writing as an accent to my art, being that I have times where I simply cannot put my ideas into a drawing.
